title: ARCHIVED - Manitoba - 2020 Income tax package - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED - Manitoba - 2020 Income tax package
The following forms and schedules can be used to help you complete your tax return.
- Download or view your return and provincial forms Federal tax Income Tax and Benefit Return This is the main form you need to complete your taxes Optional: Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Worksheet for the return Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return Manitoba tax Form MB428 - Manitoba Tax Use this form to calculate your provincial taxes to report on your return Optional: Manitoba  Information Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Worksheet  MB428 - Manitoba Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your Manitoba tax

### Download or view your return and provincial forms
- Income Tax and Benefit Return This is the main form you need to complete your taxes
- Optional: Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Worksheet for the return Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return
- Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules
- Worksheet for the return Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return
- Form MB428 - Manitoba Tax Use this form to calculate your provincial taxes to report on your return
- Optional: Manitoba  Information Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Worksheet  MB428 - Manitoba Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your Manitoba tax
- Manitoba  Information Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules
- Worksheet  MB428 - Manitoba Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your Manitoba tax
- Choose other forms and schedules that may apply Federal Schedule 2 - Federal Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse or Common-Law Partner Schedule 3 - Capital Gains (or Losses) in 2020 Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants Schedule 6 - Canada Workers Benefit Schedule 7 - RRSP and PRPP Unused Contributions, Transfers, and HBP or LLP Activities Schedule 8 - Canada Pension Plan Contributions and Overpayment for 2020 Schedule 9 - Donations and Gifts Schedule 11 - Federal Tuition, Education, and Textbook Amounts Schedule 13 - Employment Insurance Premiums on Self-Employment and Other Eligible Earnings Schedule 14 - Climate Action Incentive Manitoba Schedule MB428–A - Manitoba Family Tax Benefit Form MB479 - Manitoba Credits Schedule MB(S2) - Provincial Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse or Common-Law Partner Schedule MB(S11) - Manitoba Tuition and Education Amounts

### Choose other forms and schedules that may apply
- Schedule 2 - Federal Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule 3 - Capital Gains (or Losses) in 2020
- Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants
- Schedule 6 - Canada Workers Benefit
- Schedule 7 - RRSP and PRPP Unused Contributions, Transfers, and HBP or LLP Activities
- Schedule 8 - Canada Pension Plan Contributions and Overpayment for 2020
- Schedule 9 - Donations and Gifts
- Schedule 11 - Federal Tuition, Education, and Textbook Amounts
- Schedule 13 - Employment Insurance Premiums on Self-Employment and Other Eligible Earnings
- Schedule 14 - Climate Action Incentive
- Schedule MB428–A - Manitoba Family Tax Benefit
- Form MB479 - Manitoba Credits
- Schedule MB(S2) - Provincial Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule MB(S11) - Manitoba Tuition and Education Amounts
- Send us your paper return or use another method to file Print and mail your paper return Where to mail your paper T1 return Mailing addresses for: Canadian residents Non-residents File online or use another option Find a way to file your taxes Other methods to file like: Certified tax software
									(electronic filing) Authorize a representative Community volunteer tax clinic Discounter (tax preparer)
